  > type ProductID
    - Defined In:      06_type_aliases/src/main.go

    - Underlying:      string
    - Stringability:   0

  > type Request
    - Defined In:      06_type_aliases/src/main.go
    - TypeString:      main.Request
    - Underlying:      struct{RequestID string; ExternalUser models.internalUser}
    - Stringability:   0
    - Fields:
      - RequestID            main.UserID
        (Canonical Package: testcase_06_type_aliases)
      - ExternalUser         models.PublicUser
        (Canonical Package: testcase_06_type_aliases/models)

    - Defined In:      06_type_aliases/src/main.go
    - TypeString:      string
    - Underlying:      string
